basic_details.job_title: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 141 Assistant Professor, Associate Professor & Professor Posts
basic_details.notification_number: Professor: Estt-1/1041-Vol(IV)/No. 5793 dated 18.05.2026 Associate Professor: Estt-1/1041-Vol(IV)/No. 5792 dated 18.05.2026 Assistant Professor: Estt-I/1041(Vol-IV) No. 5791 dated 18.05.2026
basic_details.post_name: Professor / Professor-cum-Principal/Director, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: Utkal University Assistant Professor, Associate Professor & Professor Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Utkal University recruitment notification 2026 for 141 faculty vacancies (39 Professor, 51 Associate Professor, 51 Assistant Professor) across various departments under Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar. The online application process starts on 19th May 2026 and the last date to submit the online application is 20th June 2026. Find Utkal University vacancies across departments at the official website utkaluniversity.ac.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming Utkal University

important_dates.hard copy mailing address: The Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar, District-Khordha, Odisha – 751004

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid online via the bank details given in the HIMS portal. The fee is non-refundable. Applications without the applicable fee will be summarily rejected.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of submission of online application (20-06-2026). Applications are open to eligible Indian Citizens and Overseas Citizens of India (OCIs). Minimum qualification at the Master's level is 55% marks (or equivalent grade in a point-scale). A relaxation of 5% is allowed at Bachelor's and Master's level for SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy Layer)/PwBD candidates. A relaxation of 5% (from 55% to 50%) is also available to PhD holders who obtained their Master's Degree prior to 19 September 1991. Only Matriculation/SSC certificate or equivalent issued by the concerned educational board will be accepted as proof of date of birth. | Educational Qualification

vacancy_details.Category: c) OA, BA, OL, OAL, BLA, BLOA, CP, LC, Dw, AAV, MDy

vacancy_details.Description: Autism Spectrum Disorder (Mild), Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness
Multiple Disabilities involving (a) to (d) above; W = Women

category_wise_vacancy.Description: Multiple Disabilities involving (a) to (d) above; W = Women

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Pay Level-14 (as per 7th CPC) | Associate Professor: Pay Level-13A (as per 7th CPC) | Assistant Professor: As per UGC norms

selection_process: Publications Assessment (prior to 14-06-2019) UGC Cancelled list
Publications Assessment (14-06-2019 to 26-06-2025) Scopus/Web of Science/ UGC Care
Publications Assessment (from 27-06-2025) Scopus/Web of Science only
The selection process consists of application screening/scrutiny followed by an Interview/Selection Committee as per UGC Notification 18th July 2018
supported by the Act and Statute of the University. The list of eligible and ineligible candidates will be displayed on the University website. Candidates will be judged holistically on cognitive
and affective domains. Candidates called for interview must come prepared with a PPT covering brief biodata
and vision for the University and nation building.

Research Score Augmentation for Papers (as per Thomson Reuters Impact Factor): Papers in refereed journals without impact factor – 5 Points; Impact factor <1 – 10 Points; between 1 and 2 – 15 Points; between 2 and 5 – 20 Points; between 5 and 10 – 25 Points; >10 – 30 Points. Two authors: 70% of total value each; more than two authors: 70% for First/Principal/Corresponding author and 30% for each joint author.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online through the HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in) which will be available from 19.05.2026. Candidates must complete the application in all respects and upload all supporting documents on or before 20.06.2026. Candidates applying for more than one post must apply online separately for each post, paying application fee for each application. The online application can be filled in multiple sessions. No other format of application or CV will be accepted by email or any other means.

In addition, a hard copy of the downloaded and submitted application along with all relevant documents must be sent only via Speed Post/Registered Post to: The Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar, District-Khordha, Odisha–751004 on or before 29.06.2026. Courier/ordinary post/hand delivery will not be accepted. The envelope must be superscribed "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF [PROFESSOR/ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR/ASSISTANT PROFESSOR]" along with Advertisement No. and Date.
Documents to be Submitted (Hard Copy along with Online Application):
Self-attested copies of all documents as per the application form, placed with serial numbers matching the form
Matriculation/SSC certificate or equivalent (Date of Birth proof – only this document accepted)
Master's Degree certificate and marksheets; Ph.D. award letter
Experience certificates with evidence of research/teaching as required
All publications with supporting documents (self-attested); no claim without supporting evidence will be counted
Valid caste certificate (SC/ST/SEBC) issued by competent authority in prescribed Odisha Government format
Disability Certificate issued by competent authority in the format prescribed by Government of Odisha (for PwBD candidates)
NOC from employer / copy of application forwarded through proper channel (for Govt./PSU/Autonomous Body employees)
Photograph in JPEG format (less than 200kb); documents in PDF/image format (clearly readable)
important_instructions: Applications are open to eligible Indian Citizens and Overseas Citizens of India (OCIs) as per UGC eligibility criteria. Candidates above 60 years of age are not eligible to apply. Candidates applying for more than one post must apply separately for each post and pay the applicable fee for each. Application fee is non-refundable; applications without fee will be summarily rejected. No hard copy will be considered if the applicant fails to submit the online application by the closing date. The period spent acquiring M.Phil. or Ph.D. degree shall not be considered as research experience. Publications in predatory/dubious journals or presentations in predatory/dubious conferences will not be considered at any point in the selection process. Any entry/claim made in the application without supporting documents will not be counted towards the score claimed for the position applied. Only the Matriculation/SSC certificate issued by the concerned educational board will be accepted for date of birth verification. Reserved category candidates (SC/ST/SEBC) must be domiciles/permanent residents of Odisha for availing reservation benefits. Candidates should produce all self-attested documents at the time of interview; only the HIMS portal downloaded application form is acceptable for hardcopy. No TA/DA shall be paid to candidates for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will be subject to disqualification of candidature. The University reserves the right not to fill up any or some of the advertised vacancies without assigning any reason, and to revise/reschedule/cancel/suspend the recruitment process at any time. The decision of the University shall be final and binding. Any change or amendment in this advertisement will be displayed on the University website only; candidates are advised to visit https://utkaluniversity.ac.in regularly and remain updated till the last date. In case of any inadvertent mistake detected at any stage even after the issue of an appointment letter, the University reserves the right to modify/withdraw/cancel any communication made to the candidate(s). Any other relaxation and reservation applicable but not mentioned shall be as per Govt. of Odisha, as notified from time to time.

faq.question: Q1. What is Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive by Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar to fill 141 regular faculty positions including 39 Professor, 51 Associate Professor, and 51 Assistant Professor posts across 23-27 departments under three separate notifications dated 18 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 141 vacancies are available: 39 Professor posts (UR-18, ST-9, SC-8, SEBC-4), 51 Associate Professor posts (UR-18, ST-17, SC-9, SEBC-7), and 51 Assistant Professor posts (UR-27, ST-10, SC-4, SEBC-10) with horizontal reservation for Women and PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 20 June 2026 (midnight), with hard copy submission deadline of 29 June 2026 via Speed Post/Registered Post to The Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligibility follows UGC Notification 18th July 2018: Assistant Professor requires Master's degree with 55% marks plus NET/SET/Ph.D.; Associate Professor requires Ph.D. with 8 years experience and 75 research score; Professor requires Ph.D. with 10 years experience, 10 publications, and 120 research score.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates above 60 years of age are not eligible to apply. There is no lower age limit specified, but candidates must fulfill the minimum qualification and experience requirements as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening/scrutiny as per UGC Notification 18th July 2018 followed by Interview/Selection Committee assessment with mandatory PPT presentation covering biodata, research, teaching methodology, AI in pedagogy, and vision for nation building.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, application fee is ₹2,000 for General/SEBC candidates and ₹1,000 for SC/ST/PwD/Women candidates, payable online through HIMS portal (non-refundable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Utkal University Faculty posts 2026?
faq.answer: Professor posts offer Pay Level-14, Associate Professor posts offer Pay Level-13A as per 7th CPC, and Assistant Professor posts offer salary as per UGC norms with applicable allowances and perquisites.

faq.question: Q9. Can Overseas Citizens of India apply for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, applications are open to both eligible Indian Citizens and Overseas Citizens of India (OCIs) who meet the UGC eligibility criteria as per UGC Notification 18th July 2018 and subsequent amendments.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through HIMS Portal (hims.odisha.gov.in) from 19 May 2026 to 20 June 2026, upload all documents, pay application fee, and also send hard copy with supporting documents via Speed Post/Registered Post to The Registrar, Utkal University by 29 June 2026.
